title: Modern Downtown Condo
description: Stunning modern condo in the heart of downtown with panoramic city views, open floor plan, and premium finishes throughout.

title: Cozy Suburban Family Home
description: Spacious family home on a quiet tree-lined street. Updated kitchen, hardwood floors, large backyard with pool.

title: Beachfront Paradise
description: Wake up to ocean views every morning. This beachfront property features floor-to-ceiling windows, a private deck, and direct beach access.

title: Charming Craftsman Bungalow
description: Classic craftsman charm with original woodwork, built-in shelving, covered porch, and a beautifully landscaped garden.
